title: Junior Instructional Designer at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani Digital Technologies:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
